headlines.headline: Zrovov Advisors reports 18% increase in customer acquisition

sentiment.reasoning: An 18% increase in customer acquisition directly signals revenue growth and improved market penetration.

headlines.headline: Calvis Sciences delays product launch in data analytics segment

sentiment.reasoning: Delaying a product launch postpones expected revenue streams and suggests potential operational or development hurdles.

headlines.headline: Xelvol Biotech withdraws from Europe market citing unfavorable conditions

sentiment.reasoning: Withdrawing from a major geographic market represents a significant contraction of the addressable market and future revenue potential.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
